title: Allow "Move Item to Group" Workflow Block Be a Parameter

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Allow Workflow Block “move item to group” be a dynamic parameter that can be taken from column data, and not just from existing Groups or Item Group ID. For example, from a Year label column.

What are you trying to achieve

Currently, you can only move an item to a group that already exists. This creates issues with future groups that are created in which the Workflow Builder for moving the item to the group needs to be constantly updated. Having the ability to move an item to a group named based on column data would be ideal.
